assertions.expectation: Recommends migrating all 'No channel' clusters to release channels as a first priority
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends moving no-channel clusters to release channels with specific gcloud command and identifies this as enabling auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE upgrade visibility for checking each cluster's auto-upgrade status and target version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE upgrade visibility feature or checking auto-upgrade status, only shows basic cluster listing commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for identifying clusters using deprecated APIs
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the deprecation insights dashboard, only shows basic grep commands for checking deprecated features

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking EoS timelines for each cluster and prioritizing those closest to EoS
assertions.reason: Response mentions clusters running versions 2+ minor releases behind as red flags but does not specifically mention EoS timelines or prioritization based on EoS dates

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as an ongoing monitoring tool
assertions.reason: Response mentions general upgrade notifications via Pub/Sub but does not specifically mention EoS notifications via Cloud Logging

assertions.expectation: Recommends enrolling in scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance) for all clusters
assertions.reason: Response shows setting up notification config but does not specifically mention 72h advance scheduled upgrade notifications

assertions.expectation: Suggests standardizing on a channel strategy: dev→Rapid, staging→Regular, prod→Stable/Extended
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions migration path 'No channel → Rapid → Regular (for testing) → Stable (for prod)' which aligns with this channel strategy

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring rollout sequencing to control upgrade ordering across the fleet
assertions.reason: Response mentions staggering upgrades in timeline but does not specifically mention configuring rollout sequencing as a GKE feature

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE Insights and Recommendations in the console for identifying issues like version skew
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE Insights and Recommendations feature in the console for identifying version skew or other issues
